title: Orcore (discontinued)
description: The Core mod for ItsOriginal's (and other's) mods.
body:
```This mod is now archived, due to being abandoned and mod files have been lost.```


# About the mod
The Core mod for ItsOriginal's (and other's) mods.
OrCore is a mod used to handle other mod functionality.
You can basically think of it as a core to other mods.
OrCore is also used to check if the mod is loaded.

# How do I use this "core" mod?
> - Just put it into your mods folder ( %APPDATA%\.minecraft\mods ), or 
> - On the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app), just click install and install onto your Forge 1.20+ Instance or NeoForge 1.21+ Instance. It's just that easy!

- To use the mod checking feature, type in the following command:

```
orcore:show_loaded_mods <Your Username to Run as>
```
# How do I get my mod to run on this "core" mod?

Just ask ItsOriginal on discord. Go through the Ormods Offical Discord server link.
**The only supported mods at the moment are:**
- Command Utility 3.3+
- Commands Tools
- ~~UnderPlus~~ (DISCONTINUED MOD) by Luckystar and AdibAA
## IF: But I don't have discord!
Ask your friend if he/she has discord.
